sourceText: 20th Century
translatedText: Karni na 20

sourceText: Andrew Carnegie
translatedText: Andrew Carnegie ne adam wata

sourceText: Born into poverty as a Scottish immigrant, Carnegie experienced grueling labor from a young age, working in factories and facing significant educational disadvantages.
translatedText: An haife shi cikin talauci a matsayin ɗan gudun hijira na Scotland, Carnegie ya ɗanɗana aiki mai wahala tun yana ƙarami, yana aiki a masana'antu kuma yana fuskantar ƙarancin ilimi.

sourceText: He pursued knowledge voraciously through reading and self-education, meticulously analyzed business opportunities, and leveraged mentors and sheer determination to overcome his humble beginnings and achieve immense success.
translatedText: Ya bi diddigin ilimi ta hanyar karatu da karantar da kansa, ya yi nazari sosai kan damar kasuwanci, ya ba da jagoranci da jajircewarsa don shawo kan farkonsa mai tawali'u da samun gagarumar nasara.

sourceText: 19th-20th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19-20

sourceText: Edgar Allan Poe
translatedText: Edgar Allan Poe

sourceText: Orphaned at a young age, he faced financial hardship, alcoholism, and profound grief from the deaths of loved ones.
translatedText: Ya kasance maraya sa’ad da yake ƙarami, ya fuskanci matsalar kuɗi, shaye-shaye, da kuma baƙin ciki ƙwarai daga mutuwar ƙaunatattunsa.

sourceText: He transformed his pain and despair into literary creation, building a unique body of work that profoundly influenced posterity.
translatedText: Ya canza raɗaɗinsa da raɗaɗinsa zuwa halittar adabi, ya gina wani nau'in aiki na musamman wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga zuriya.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Ernest Hemingway
translatedText: Ernest Hemingway

sourceText: Hemingway endured profound physical and psychological suffering, including injuries from World War I, his participation in the Spanish Civil War, two failed marriages, and lifelong battles with depression and alcoholism.
translatedText: Hemingway ya jimre da tsananin wahala ta jiki da ta hankali, gami da raunin da ya faru daga Yaƙin Duniya na ɗaya, shiga cikin Yaƙin basasa na Sipaniya, aure biyu da suka gaza, da yaƙin rayuwa na rayuwa tare da baƙin ciki da shaye-shaye.

sourceText: He channeled his pain into his writing, exploring the meaning of life. He sought the essence of existence through intense experiences like fishing, hunting, and bullfighting, imbuing his work with profound resonance for many.
translatedText: Ya shigar da ciwonsa a cikin rubuce-rubucensa, yana nazarin ma'anar rayuwa. Ya nemi ainihin wanzuwar ta hanyoyi masu tsanani kamar kamun kifi, farauta, da yaƙin bijimi, yana cike da aikin nasa tare da jin daɗi ga mutane da yawa.

sourceText: 20th Century
translatedText: Karni na 20

sourceText: Henry David Thoreau
translatedText: Henry David Thoreau

sourceText: Thoreau faced financial struggles, particularly the burden of supporting his family after his father's death. He also experienced the frustration of his writings not being widely recognized during his lifetime and suffered from recurring health issues.
translatedText: Thoreau ya fuskanci matsalolin kuɗi, musamman nauyin tallafawa iyalinsa bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa. Ya kuma fuskanci takaicin yadda rubuce-rubucensa ba a san su ba a lokacin rayuwarsa kuma ya sha fama da matsalolin lafiya da suka taso.

sourceText: Amidst these difficulties, Thoreau found solace and answers in nature. His self-sufficient life at Walden Pond demonstrated a path of pursuing spiritual growth over material wealth. His writings, though unrecognized by many at the time, eventually gained profound influence, serving as a testament to his resilience and vision.
translatedText: A cikin waɗannan matsalolin, Thoreau ya sami kwanciyar hankali da amsoshi cikin yanayi. Rayuwarsa mai dogaro da kansa a Walden Pond ya nuna hanyar neman ci gaban ruhaniya akan dukiyar abin duniya. Rubuce-rubucensa, duk da cewa mutane da yawa ba su san shi ba a lokacin, amma daga ƙarshe ya sami babban tasiri, wanda ya zama shaida ga tsayin daka da hangen nesa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: He suffered from chronic health issues from a young age. The Panic of 1873 and the severe Panic of 1907 presented significant threats to his financial empire.
translatedText: Ya sha fama da matsalolin lafiya na yau da kullun tun yana ƙuruciya. Tsoro na 1873 da tsananin tsoro na 1907 sun gabatar da babbar barazana ga daular kuɗinsa.

sourceText: During these crises, Morgan demonstrated decisive leadership, consolidating banks, providing capital, and stabilizing the financial system. His determination and foresight were key to overcoming these challenges.
translatedText: A lokacin waɗannan rikice-rikice, Morgan ya nuna jagoranci mai mahimmanci, ƙarfafa bankuna, samar da jari, da daidaita tsarin kuɗi. Jajircewa da hangen nesansa sune mabuɗin shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubale.

sourceText: 19th-20th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19-20

sourceText: Ralph Waldo Emerson
translatedText: Ralph Waldo Emerson

sourceText: Deep spiritual doubts during his time as a minister, the profound grief from the death of his first wife Ellen Tucker and his young son Waldo, and personal health struggles.
translatedText: Zurfafa shakku na ruhaniya a lokacin da yake hidima, babban baƙin ciki daga mutuwar matarsa ​​ta farko Ellen Tucker da ƙaramin ɗansa Waldo, da gwagwarmayar lafiyar mutum.

sourceText: He found solace and renewed purpose through philosophical inquiry, embracing his role as a public intellectual and writer, and articulating his vision of self-reliance and spiritual intuition.
translatedText: Ya sami kwanciyar hankali da sabunta manufa ta hanyar bincike na falsafa, yana rungumar matsayinsa na haziƙan jama'a da marubuci, da bayyana hangen nesansa na dogaro da kai da ruhi.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Susan B Anthony
translatedText: Susan B Anthony

sourceText: She experienced profound pain from the societal injustice of women being denied the right to vote and treated as second-class citizens. The movement itself brought constant opposition, public ridicule, and even threats of arrest and imprisonment.
translatedText: Ta fuskanci zafi mai tsanani daga rashin adalcin al'umma da aka hana mata 'yancin yin zabe da kuma kula da su a matsayin 'yan kasa na biyu. Wannan yunkuri da kansa ya kawo adawa akai-akai, da ba'a ga jama'a, har ma da barazanar kamawa da dauri.

sourceText: Anthony tirelessly lectured, organized, and lobbied for legislative change, refusing to be deterred. She found strength in solidarity with fellow activists, maintaining hope and perseverance through immense challenges.
translatedText: Anthony ya yi lacca ba tare da gajiyawa ba, ya shirya, kuma ya nemi sauyin majalisa, ya ƙi a hana shi. Ta sami ƙarfi cikin haɗin kai tare da ƴan'uwanmu masu fafutuka, tana riƙe bege da jajircewa ta hanyar ƙalubale masu yawa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Walt Whitman
translatedText: Walt Whitman

sourceText: Whitman experienced profound psychological distress witnessing the horrors of the Civil War as a volunteer nurse, tending to wounded soldiers. He also faced societal prejudice and personal isolation due to his openly acknowledged homosexuality.
translatedText: Whitman ya fuskanci tsananin damuwa na tunani yana shaida munin yakin basasa a matsayin ma'aikaciyar jinya mai aikin sa kai, tana kula da sojoji da suka ji rauni. Ya kuma fuskanci kyamar al'umma da keɓe kansa saboda luwadi da ya fito fili.

sourceText: He transmuted the trauma of war and his personal struggles into his seminal work, 'Leaves of Grass.' Through his experiences, he cultivated compassion and inclusivity, celebrating the universal value of human existence, thus overcoming his pain and achieving artistic transcendence.
translatedText: Ya canza raunin yaƙi da gwagwarmayarsa zuwa cikin aikinsa na farko, 'Leaves of Grass'. Ta hanyar abubuwan da ya faru, ya horar da tausayi da haɗin kai, yana murna da kimar duniya ta wanzuwar ɗan adam, ta haka ya shawo kan zafinsa da kuma samun fifikon fasaha.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: He endured immense personal suffering, including the loss of two sons, the suicide of his daughter, and the destruction of his home and possessions during World War II. He also faced the moral dilemma of working under the Nazi regime and the persecution of his Jewish colleagues.
translatedText: Ya jimre wa wahala mai yawa, ciki har da rasa ’ya’ya maza biyu, kashe ’yarsa, da halakar gidansa da dukiyarsa a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu. Ya kuma fuskanci matsalar ɗabi’a ta yin aiki a ƙarƙashin gwamnatin Nazi da kuma tsananta wa abokan aikinsa Yahudawa.

sourceText: Planck's recovery was marked by his unwavering dedication to science and his efforts to preserve scientific integrity amidst political turmoil. He continued his research and advocacy for academic freedom, seeking to rebuild the scientific community after the devastation of war.
translatedText: Farfadowar Planck ya kasance alama ce ta sadaukar da kai ga kimiyya da ƙoƙarinsa na kiyaye amincin kimiyya a cikin rudanin siyasa. Ya ci gaba da bincike da bayar da shawarwarin neman ’yancin ilimi, yana neman sake gina al’ummar kimiyya bayan barnar yaki.

sourceText: Late 19th - Mid 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Tsakiyar Karni na 20

sourceText: As a prominent pagan intellectual in an era of escalating religious and political turmoil, Hypatia faced marginalization and persecution. The growing tensions between Christianity and paganism placed her life in peril.
translatedText: A matsayinsa na ƙwararren maguzawa ƙwararren arna a zamanin da ke ƙara ta'azzara rikicin addini da na siyasa, Hypatia ya fuskanci wariya da tsanantawa. Tashin hankali tsakanin Kiristanci da arna ya sanya rayuwarta cikin haɗari.

sourceText: She championed knowledge and reason, striving to maintain an intellectual community amidst conflict by teaching philosophy and science to students from diverse backgrounds. Her teachings represented the power of reason against violence and fanaticism.
translatedText: Ta ba da fifikon ilimi da hankali, tana ƙoƙarin kiyaye al'umma masu hankali a cikin rikici ta hanyar koyar da falsafa da kimiyya ga ɗalibai daga wurare daban-daban. Koyarwarta tana wakiltar ikon tunani game da tashin hankali da tsatsauran ra'ayi.

sourceText: Late Antiquity
translatedText: Late Antiquity

sourceText: Ibn Al Haytham faced significant challenges due to the political turmoil of his era and the resistance to his novel ideas. A notable instance involved his assignment to a dam construction project by the Fatimid ruler Al-Hakim. When the project proved unfeasible according to his designs, he experienced profound disappointment and frustration.
translatedText: Ibn Al Haytham ya fuskanci kalubale masu mahimmanci saboda rudanin siyasar zamaninsa da kuma tsayin daka ga ra'ayoyinsa na labari. Wani muhimmin misali ya haɗa da aikinsa na aikin gina madatsar ruwa na sarkin Fatimid Al-Hakim. Lokacin da aikin ya kasance ba zai yiwu ba bisa ga ƙirarsa, ya sami babban takaici da takaici.

sourceText: Despite these setbacks, his passion for knowledge remained undeterred. The eventual cessation of his administrative duties freed him to focus intensely on his scholarly pursuits. During his confinement and subsequent years, he delved deeper into optics, mathematics, and scientific methodology, producing seminal works that would cement his legacy as the 'Father of Optics'.
translatedText: Duk da wannan koma-baya, sha'awar iliminsa ta kasance ba ta yankewa ba. Dakatar da ayyukansa na gudanarwa ya sa ya mai da hankali sosai kan ayyukansa na ilimi. A lokacin da yake tsare da kuma shekarun da suka biyo baya, ya zurfafa zurfafa a fannin kimiyyar gani, lissafi, da hanyoyin kimiyya, inda ya samar da ayyukan hauza wadanda za su tabbatar da gadonsa a matsayin 'Uban Optics'.

sourceText: Late 10th to Early 11th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 10th zuwa Farkon Karni na 11

sourceText: Blaise Pascal
translatedText: Blaise Pascal ne adam wata

sourceText: Pascal suffered from chronic illnesses and neuralgia from a young age. His life was also marked by profound religious and philosophical introspection, which caused him considerable internal turmoil. His posthumously published 'Pensées' vividly illustrates this inner conflict.
translatedText: Pascal ya sha fama da cututtuka na yau da kullun da neuralgia tun yana ƙarami. Rayuwarsa kuma ta kasance da zurfin zurfin tunani na addini da falsafa, wanda ya haifar masa da tashin hankali na cikin gida. 'Pensees' da aka buga bayan mutuwarsa yana kwatanta wannan rikici na ciki.

sourceText: Despite his physical suffering, Pascal relentlessly pursued intellectual inquiry. He transformed his suffering into an object of faith, seeking spiritual solace and answers through deep reflection on human existence's paradoxes and divine grace.
translatedText: Duk da wahalar jikinsa, Pascal ya bi diddigin binciken hankali. Ya sāke shan wahalarsa zuwa wani abu na bangaskiya, yana neman ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya da amsoshi ta wurin zurfafa tunani a kan sabani na wanzuwar ɗan adam da alherin Allah.

sourceText: 17th Century
translatedText: Karni na 17

sourceText: Mendeleev's early life was marked by poverty and the absence of his father, and his non-noble status presented obstacles to academic opportunities. Furthermore, upon the initial presentation of his periodic table, he faced skepticism and a lack of recognition from many of his peers.
translatedText: Rayuwar farko ta Mendeleev ta kasance alama ce ta talauci da rashin mahaifinsa, kuma matsayinsa marar daraja ya kawo cikas ga damar ilimi. Bugu da ƙari, a farkon gabatar da teburinsa na lokaci-lokaci, ya fuskanci shakku da rashin amincewa daga yawancin takwarorinsa.

sourceText: He overcame academic adversities through relentless research and dedication. His unwavering commitment to systematically classifying elements led to the completion of the periodic table, which ultimately became recognized as his monumental achievement.
translatedText: Ya shawo kan matsalolin ilimi ta hanyar bincike da sadaukarwa. Jajircewarsa na rarrabuwar kawuna cikin tsari ya kai ga kammala tebur na lokaci-lokaci, wanda a ƙarshe ya zama sananne a matsayin babban nasararsa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Ada Lovelace
translatedText: Ada Lovelace

sourceText: Rigorous education enforced by her mother, societal judgment due to her father's scandalous life, persistent health issues, and a struggle with gambling.
translatedText: Tsananin ilimin da mahaifiyarta ta tilastawa, hukuncin al'umma saboda mummunan rayuwar mahaifinta, matsalolin lafiya na ci gaba, da gwagwarmaya tare da caca.

sourceText: She found solace and intellectual fulfillment by focusing on mathematics and logic, and by collaborating with Charles Babbage, she brought her visionary ideas to fruition.
translatedText: Ta sami nutsuwa da cikar hankali ta hanyar mai da hankali kan ilimin lissafi da dabaru, kuma ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da Charles Babbage, ta kawo ra'ayoyinta na hangen nesa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Alan Turing
translatedText: Alan Turing

sourceText: He was prosecuted in 1952 for homosexual acts, a criminal offense at the time, and was subjected to chemical castration. This deeply impacted his career and mental well-being.
translatedText: An tuhume shi a cikin 1952 saboda ayyukan luwadi, laifin aikata laifuka a lokacin, kuma an yi masa lalata da sinadarai. Wannan ya yi tasiri sosai ga aikinsa da lafiyar tunaninsa.

sourceText: Through his groundbreaking research and theoretical work, he paved the way for the digital age. His contributions were posthumously recognized, and his legacy was eventually restored and honored.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bincikensa mai ban sha'awa da aikin ka'idar, ya ba da hanya don shekarun dijital. An gane irin gudunmawar da ya bayar bayan an mutu, kuma a ƙarshe an sake dawo da abin da ya gada kuma aka girmama shi.

sourceText: 20th Century
translatedText: Karni na 20

sourceText: Charles Babbage
translatedText: Charles Babbage

sourceText: The development of his groundbreaking machines, particularly the Analytical Engine, was hampered by a lack of funding and government support. He often faced financial difficulties and criticism from contemporaries who failed to grasp his vision.
translatedText: Samar da injunan da ya ke yi, musamman Injin Analytical, ya samu cikas saboda rashin kudi da tallafin gwamnati. Ya sha fuskantar matsalar kudi da suka daga mutanen zamanin da suka kasa fahimtar hangen nesansa.

sourceText: Despite financial constraints and technical challenges, Babbage persevered. He continuously refined his ideas, improved his designs, and tirelessly explained the significance of his work. Although his machines were not completed in his lifetime, his monumental designs profoundly influenced the development of computer science for future generations.
translatedText: Duk da matsalolin kuɗi da ƙalubalen fasaha, Babbage ya dage. Ya ci gaba da tsaftace ra'ayoyinsa, ya inganta zanensa, da kuma bayyana ma'anar aikinsa ba tare da gajiyawa ba. Ko da yake ba a kammala na'urorinsa a rayuwarsa ba, manyan zane-zanensa sun yi tasiri sosai kan haɓakar kimiyyar kwamfuta ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: He faced political turmoil and periods of exile, which disrupted his scholarly pursuits and writing. His fame also attracted envy and opposition from some contemporaries.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci rudanin siyasa da zaman gudun hijira, wanda hakan ya kawo cikas ga ayyukansa na ilimi da rubuce-rubuce. Kuma shahararsa ta jawo hassada da adawa daga wasu mutanen zamanin.

sourceText: Despite the challenges, Ibn Sina maintained an unwavering dedication to his studies. He persevered through constant research and writing, producing a vast body of work that cemented his legacy and overcame the obstacles he faced.
translatedText: Duk da kalubalen, Ibn Sina ya ci gaba da sadaukar da kai ga karatunsa. Ya jajirce ta hanyar bincike da rubuce-rubuce akai-akai, tare da samar da ayyuka masu tarin yawa wadanda suka tabbatar da gadonsa da kuma shawo kan matsalolin da ya fuskanta.

sourceText: Late 10th - Early 11th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 10th - Farkon Ƙarni na 11

sourceText: Early steam engines were inefficient and prone to frequent breakdowns, leading to business difficulties. Watt also faced significant emotional distress due to patent disputes and conflicts with business partners.
translatedText: Injin tururi na farko ba su da inganci kuma suna fuskantar lalacewa akai-akai, wanda ke haifar da matsalolin kasuwanci. Har ila yau, Watt ya fuskanci babban damuwa na tunani saboda takaddamar haƙƙin mallaka da kuma rikice-rikice tare da abokan kasuwanci.

sourceText: Through persistent research and experimentation, he developed the innovative idea of a separate condenser, drastically increasing the steam engine's efficiency. Furthermore, by collaborating with Matthew Boulton, he expanded his business and resolved patent issues, overcoming his challenges.
translatedText: Ta hanyar ci gaba da bincike da gwaji, ya ɓullo da sabon ra'ayi na na'ura mai ba da hanya tsakanin hanyoyin sadarwa, yana ƙara ƙarfin injin tururi sosai. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa tare da Matthew Boulton, ya fadada kasuwancinsa kuma ya warware matsalolin haƙƙin mallaka, yana shawo kan kalubalensa.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Karni na 18

sourceText: George Stephenson
translatedText: George Stephenson

sourceText: Born into poverty with limited formal education, Stephenson faced significant disadvantages. His groundbreaking ideas were often met with skepticism and technical limitations of the era, making the path to innovation arduous.
translatedText: An haife shi cikin talauci tare da ƙarancin ilimi na yau da kullun, Stephenson ya fuskanci babban lahani. Ra'ayoyinsa masu tasowa sau da yawa sun gamu da shakku da gazawar fasaha na wannan zamani, yana mai da hanyar yin sabon abu mai wuyar gaske.

sourceText: He pursued self-education in mechanical engineering, working tirelessly day and night. Despite numerous setbacks and failures, Stephenson's relentless dedication to developing the steam locomotive eventually earned him recognition and paved the way for the railway age.
translatedText: Ya yi karatun kansa a fannin injiniyanci, yana aiki ba dare ba rana. Duk da koma baya da gazawa da yawa, sadaukarwar Stephenson da ya yi don haɓaka motocin motsa jiki daga ƙarshe ya sami karɓuwa kuma ya ba da hanya ga shekarun layin dogo.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Gregor Mendel
translatedText: Gregor Mendel asalin

sourceText: Mendel experienced profound frustration as his groundbreaking research went unrecognized and largely forgotten during his lifetime. While his papers were published, the scientific community failed to grasp their significance immediately. He also struggled with limited time for research due to his responsibilities as a monk and educator.
translatedText: Mendel ya gamu da bacin rai yayin da ba a gane babban bincikensa ba kuma an manta da shi a lokacin rayuwarsa. Yayin da aka buga takardunsa, masana kimiyya sun kasa fahimtar muhimmancin su nan da nan. Ya kuma yi gwagwarmaya da karancin lokacin bincike saboda nauyin da ya rataya a wuyansa na sufaye da tarbiyya.

sourceText: Despite the lack of contemporary recognition, Mendel persevered with his experiments. His work was rediscovered posthumously, leading to his acclaim as the Father of Genetics. He remained steadfast in his scientific pursuits with patience, which ultimately allowed his discoveries to be recognized.
translatedText: Duk da rashin sanin halin yanzu, Mendel ya dage da gwaje-gwajensa. An sake gano aikinsa bayan mutuwarsa, wanda ya kai ga daukakarsa a matsayin Uban Halitta. Ya tsaya tsayin daka a kokarinsa na kimiyya tare da hakuri, wanda daga karshe ya ba da damar gane abubuwan da ya gano.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Antoine Lavoisier
translatedText: Antoine Lavoisier

sourceText: As a wealthy tax collector ('fermier général') during the French Revolution, he was targeted by the revolutionary government and guillotined.
translatedText: A matsayinsa na mai karɓar haraji ('fermier général') a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa, gwamnatin juyin juya hali ta yi masa niyya kuma ta yi masa laifi.

sourceText: Despite his tragic end, his scientific contributions were widely recognized posthumously, laying the foundation for modern chemistry.
translatedText: Duk da mummunan ƙarshensa, an san gudunmawar da ya bayar a kimiyya bayan mutuwarsa, wanda ya kafa harsashin kimiyyar zamani.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Karni na 18

sourceText: Compendium of Materia Medica
translatedText: Compendium na Materia Medica

sourceText: He experienced significant frustration due to setbacks in his official career, multiple failures in civil service examinations, and the pervasive inaccuracy and confusion within existing medical texts.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci babban bacin rai saboda koma baya a aikinsa na hukuma, da gazawa da yawa a gwaje-gwajen ma'aikatan gwamnati, da rashin daidaito da rudani a cikin littattafan likitanci.

sourceText: Despite these adversies, driven by a steadfast desire to aid the common people, he traveled extensively for 27 years, personally collecting herbs, meticulously studying medical literature, and ultimately completing the Bencao Gangmu.
translatedText: Duk da wa annan masifu, da tsayin dakan sha'awar taimakon jama'a ke motsa shi, ya yi balaguro da yawa na tsawon shekaru 27, yana tattara ganye da kansa, yana nazarin littattafan likitanci sosai, kuma daga ƙarshe ya kammala Bencao Gangmu.

sourceText: Ming Dynasty
translatedText: Daular Ming

sourceText: Guglielmo Marconi
translatedText: Guglielmo Marconi

sourceText: Initially, his ideas were met with skepticism, with many dismissing them as impractical. Securing funding and convincing established scientific and industrial circles proved to be significant hurdles.
translatedText: Da farko, ra'ayoyinsa sun gamu da shakku, inda da yawa suka yi watsi da su a matsayin ba su da amfani. Samar da kudade da gamsassun da'irar kimiyya da masana'antu sun kasance manyan tarnaƙi.

sourceText: Through persistent experimentation and demonstration, he gradually gained recognition for his technology. The successful transatlantic wireless transmission was a pivotal moment that validated his innovations.
translatedText: Ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje na ci gaba da nunawa, a hankali ya sami karbuwa ga fasaharsa. Nasarar watsa mara waya ta transatlantic wani muhimmin lokaci ne wanda ya tabbatar da sabbin abubuwan nasa.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Farkon ƙarni na 20

sourceText: Robert Koch
translatedText: Robert Cook

sourceText: Initial lack of funding and skepticism from peers. He faced debate, particularly after identifying the cholera bacillus, rather than immediate acceptance.
translatedText: Rashin kuɗi na farko da kuma shakka daga takwarorinsu. Ya fuskanci muhawara, musamman bayan gano kwayar cutar kwalara, maimakon karba nan da nan.

sourceText: Through persistent experimentation and rigorous proof, he solidified his discoveries. He focused on pursuing the truth, undeterred by criticism.
translatedText: Ta hanyar gwaje-gwajen dagewa da kwakkwarar hujja, ya ƙarfafa bincikensa. Ya mai da hankali kan bin gaskiya, ba tare da la’akari da suka ba.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Thomas Aquinas
translatedText: Thomas Aquinas

sourceText: St. Thomas Aquinas
translatedText: St. Thomas Aquinas

sourceText: He faced familial opposition to his religious vocation, including being held captive by his own family. He also encountered internal dissent and suspicion within his Dominican order.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci hamayya na iyali game da ayyukansa na addini, gami da tsare shi a hannun danginsa. Ya kuma ci karo da rashin yarda na cikin gida da zato a cikin umarninsa na Dominican.

sourceText: Aquinas persevered through sheer intellectual brilliance and steadfast dedication to his studies and faith. His prolific writings demonstrate his ability to overcome these obstacles and establish his profound legacy.
translatedText: Aquinas ya dage ta hanyar hazaka na hankali da tsayin daka ga karatunsa da bangaskiya. Rubuce-rubucensa masu fa'ida sun nuna iyawarsa na shawo kan waɗannan cikas da kafa babban gadonsa.

sourceText: High Middle Ages
translatedText: Babban Tsakanin Zamani

sourceText: Rumi faced immense upheaval in his life, including forced migration from his homeland in Balkh (modern-day Afghanistan) due to the Mongol invasions, settling in Konya (modern-day Turkey). The most profound pain, however, was the mysterious disappearance and presumed murder of his spiritual mentor and companion, Shams-i Tabrizi, which plunged Rumi into deep grief and existential crisis.
translatedText: Rumi ya fuskanci tashin hankali a rayuwarsa, ciki har da ƙaura ta tilastawa daga ƙasarsa ta haihuwa a Balkh (Afganistan a yau) saboda mamayewar Mongol, ya zauna a Konya (Turkiyya ta zamani). Babban ɓacin rai, duk da haka, shine ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyiyar ɓatanci da kisa da ake zaton na jagoransa kuma abokin tafiyarsa, Shams-i Tabrizi, wanda ya jefa Rumi cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi da rikicin wanzuwa.

sourceText: The loss of Shams became a catalyst for Rumi's most creative and prolific period. Instead of succumbing to despair, Rumi channeled his grief and profound love for Shams into his poetry and music. He transformed his pain into ecstatic devotion, composing his monumental works, most notably the Masnavi, which became a beacon of spiritual wisdom and a testament to the transformative power of love and loss.
translatedText: Rashin Shams ya zama sanadin Rumi mafi kyawu da fasaha. Maimakon Rumi ya yanke kauna, ya sanya bakin cikinsa da tsantsar son Shams a cikin wakoki da wakoki. Ya canza zafinsa zuwa ibada mai daɗi, yana tsara manyan ayyukansa, musamman Masnavi, wanda ya zama fitilar hikima ta ruhaniya da shaida ga ikon canza soyayya da asara.

sourceText: 13th Century
translatedText: Karni na 13

sourceText: He faced intense opposition from religious authorities, accusations of heresy, and the burning of his books, leading to restrictions on his scholarly work.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga mahukuntan addini, da zargin bidi’a, da kona littafansa, wanda ya kai ga tauye aikinsa na ilimi.

sourceText: Despite persecution, his ideas were defended and his writings were secretly preserved, eventually influencing the European Renaissance and beyond.
translatedText: Duk da tsanantawa, an kare ra'ayoyinsa kuma an adana rubuce-rubucensa a asirce, daga ƙarshe ya rinjayi Renaissance na Turai da kuma bayansa.

sourceText: 12th Century Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na Karni na 12

sourceText: William James
translatedText: William James

sourceText: Suffered from severe neurasthenia and depression in his youth, and endured difficult times with multiple career changes and personal anguish.
translatedText: Ya sha wahala daga matsanancin neurasthenia da baƙin ciki a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, kuma ya jure lokuta masu wahala tare da sauye-sauyen aiki da yawa da damuwa na sirri.

sourceText: Deeply reflected on his painful experiences, emphasizing the importance of human consciousness and will based on them, and overcame them through an active attitude towards life.
translatedText: Yayi zurfafa tunani akan abubuwansa masu raɗaɗi, yana mai jaddada mahimmancin wayewar ɗan adam da nufinsa akan su, kuma ya rinjaye su ta hanyar ɗabi'a mai aiki ga rayuwa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Friedrich Schiller
translatedText: Friedrich Schiller ne adam wata

sourceText: Repression in an authoritarian environment, illness, financial hardship, and conflicts with friends.
translatedText: Danniya a cikin mahalli mai mulki, rashin lafiya, wahalar kuɗi, da rikici da abokai.

sourceText: He overcame adversity with an unwavering belief in freedom and human dignity, realizing his ideals through literature and establishing himself as a leading intellectual of his time.
translatedText: Ya shawo kan masifu tare da imani maras tabbas game da 'yanci da mutuncin ɗan adam, yana fahimtar manufofinsa ta hanyar wallafe-wallafen kuma ya kafa kansa a matsayin jagoran masu hankali na zamaninsa.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 18th - Farkon Ƙarni na 19

sourceText: George Washington Carver
translatedText: George Washington Carver

sourceText: Born into slavery, he faced significant health challenges as a child, including pneumonia, and the systemic racism that limited opportunities for African Americans. He was often referred to as the 'plant doctor' due to his early affinity for healing plants, but formal education was a struggle.
translatedText: An haife shi cikin bauta, ya fuskanci manyan ƙalubalen kiwon lafiya tun yana yaro, ciki har da ciwon huhu, da wariyar launin fata da ke iyakance dama ga Baƙin Amurkawa. Sau da yawa ana kiransa da 'likitan shuka' saboda kusancinsa na farko don warkar da tsire-tsire, amma ilimi na yau da kullun ya kasance gwagwarmaya.

sourceText: Despite these hardships, his intellectual curiosity and dedication led him to pursue higher education. He earned advanced degrees in botany and agricultural science. Carver dedicated his life to sharing his knowledge, particularly with poor Southern farmers, helping them improve soil fertility and achieve economic independence through innovative uses for common crops.
translatedText: Duk da irin wahalhalun da ya sha, sha'awar sa na ilimi da kwazo ya kai shi ga neman ilimi mai zurfi. Ya yi digirin digirgir a fannin ilmin halitta da kimiyyar noma. Carver ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa don raba iliminsa, musamman ga matalautan manoman Kudu, yana taimaka musu wajen inganta amfanin ƙasa da samun 'yancin kan tattalin arziki ta hanyar amfani da sabbin kayan amfanin gona na yau da kullun.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Farkon ƙarni na 20

sourceText: Profound existential doubt and a spiritual crisis that led him to abandon his academic career.
translatedText: Shakku mai zurfi da rikice-rikicen ruhi wanda ya kai shi barin aikinsa na ilimi.

sourceText: Through critical examination of philosophy and a deep dive into Sufi mysticism and spiritual contemplation, he found renewed purpose and certainty.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bincike mai mahimmanci na falsafa da zurfafa zurfafa cikin sufanci Sufi da tunani na ruhaniya, ya sami sabon buri da tabbaci.

sourceText: Late 11th - Early 12th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 11 - Farkon Ƙarni na 12

sourceText: He experienced political turmoil, imprisonment, and exile, leading to an unstable life. He also suffered the loss of family and colleagues due to the Black Death.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci rikice-rikicen siyasa, dauri, da gudun hijira, wanda ya kai ga rashin kwanciyar hankali. Ya kuma yi asarar ‘yan uwa da abokan aikin sa sakamakon Bakar Mutuwa.

sourceText: Despite hardships, he never lost his passion for scholarship. Instead, he used these experiences as a foundation to write the Muqaddimah, filled with profound insights into human society and civilization.
translatedText: Duk da wahalhalun da ya sha, bai daina sha'awar neman karatu ba. Maimakon haka, ya yi amfani da waɗannan abubuwan a matsayin tushe don rubuta Muqaddimah, cike da zurfin fahimta game da zamantakewar ɗan adam da wayewa.

sourceText: 14th Century
translatedText: Karni na 14

sourceText: In his youth, Maimonides and his family were forced to flee their home in Al-Andalus due to religious persecution under Muslim rule, living as refugees for many years. This period was marked by profound insecurity and suffering.
translatedText: A lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, Maimonides da iyalinsa sun tilasta wa barin gidansu na Al-Andalus saboda zaluncin addini a ƙarƙashin mulkin Musulmi, suna zama 'yan gudun hijira tsawon shekaru. Wannan lokacin ya kasance alamar rashin tsaro da wahala.

sourceText: Despite these adversities, his pursuit of knowledge remained unyielding. Through relentless study and writing, he produced the monumental 'Mishneh Torah,' a comprehensive codification of Jewish law, and 'The Guide for the Perplexed,' a philosophical masterpiece. He transformed his personal suffering into intellectual triumph.
translatedText: Duk da wa]annan masifu, neman ilmin ya ci gaba da yin kasala. Ta hanyar nazari da rubuce-rubuce ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba, ya ƙirƙiro babban abin al'ajabi 'Mishneh Attaura,' cikakken tsarin dokokin Yahudawa, da kuma 'Jagorar Masu Rushewa,' ƙwararrun falsafa. Ya canza wahalar kansa zuwa nasara ta hankali.

sourceText: Middle Ages (12th Century)
translatedText: Tsakanin Zamani (ƙarni na 12)

sourceText: Zoroaster faced significant opposition and persecution from established religious authorities and society as he attempted to spread his new faith. His teachings were often misunderstood and rejected, leading to periods of isolation and doubt.
translatedText: Zoroaster ya fuskanci babban hamayya da tsanantawa daga kafafan hukumomin addini da al'umma yayin da yake ƙoƙarin yada sabuwar bangaskiyarsa. Sau da yawa ana kuskuren fahimtar koyarwarsa kuma an ƙi su, wanda ya kai ga keɓewa da shakku.

sourceText: He overcame these challenges through unwavering conviction and profound insight into truth. Through meditation and spiritual discipline, he received revelations from Ahura Mazda, solidifying his belief in the correctness of his message. He persistently preached his ideas, eventually gaining a substantial following.
translatedText: Ya shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubalen ta hanyar ƙwaƙƙwaran tabbaci da zurfin fahimtar gaskiya. Ta hanyar zuzzurfan tunani da horo na ruhi, ya sami wahayi daga Ahura Mazda, yana ƙarfafa imaninsa ga daidaiton saƙonsa. Ya ci gaba da yin wa'azin ra'ayoyinsa, daga ƙarshe ya sami mabiyi masu yawa.

sourceText: In his youth, Cervantes was captured by Barbary pirates while serving in Italy and spent five years as a slave. Upon his return to Spain, he faced financial difficulties and imprisonment, making his life far from easy.
translatedText: A cikin kuruciyarsa, 'yan fashin Barbary sun kama Cervantes a lokacin da yake hidima a Italiya kuma ya yi shekaru biyar a matsayin bawa. Bayan ya koma Spain, ya fuskanci matsalar kuɗi da ɗaurin kurkuku, wanda hakan ya sa rayuwarsa ta yi nisa sosai.

sourceText: Despite these adversities, he never lost his passion for literature. His vivid experiences and profound understanding of human nature were transformed into immortal works like Don Quixote.
translatedText: Duk da irin waɗannan matsaloli, bai daina sha’awar adabi ba. Abubuwan gogewarsa da zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam an canza su zuwa ayyuka marasa mutuwa kamar Don Quixote.

sourceText: Spanish Golden Age
translatedText: Mutanen Espanya Golden Age

sourceText: Leo Tolstoy
translatedText: Leo Tolstoy

sourceText: Leo Tolstoy
translatedText: Leo Tolstoy

sourceText: Tolstoy grappled with profound anguish stemming from his brutal experiences in the Crimean War, conflicts with loved ones, and a lifelong spiritual crisis. The search for life's meaning and the fear of death tormented him.
translatedText: Tolstoy ya komo da baƙin ciki mai zurfi da ya samo asali daga mummunan abubuwan da ya fuskanta a yakin Crimean, rikice-rikice da ƙaunatattunsa, da rikicin ruhaniya na rayuwa. Neman ma'anar rayuwa da tsoron mutuwa sun addabi shi.

sourceText: He sought to overcome these struggles through literary exploration and deep introspection. Tolstoy found simple truths in the lives of peasants and strived for spiritual peace through non-violent resistance and asceticism. His works are the culmination of this struggle and reflection.
translatedText: Ya nemi shawo kan waɗannan gwagwarmaya ta hanyar bincike na adabi da zurfafa zurfafa. Tolstoy ya sami gaskiya mai sauƙi a cikin rayuwar ƙauye kuma ya yi ƙoƙari don samun zaman lafiya ta ruhaniya ta hanyar juriya da rashin tausayi. Ayyukansa sune ƙarshen wannan gwagwarmaya da tunani.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Murasaki Shikibu
translatedText: Murasaki Shikibu

sourceText: The early death of her mother, the limitations placed upon women pursuing scholarship, and the loneliness experienced amidst the complex human relationships of court life.
translatedText: Farkon mutuwar mahaifiyarta, gazawar da aka sanya wa mata masu neman neman ilimi, da kadaicin da aka samu a tsakanin hadaddun dangantakar dan Adam na rayuwar kotu.

sourceText: She sublimated her inner suffering by creating 'The Tale of Genji,' drawing upon her keen observation and delicate sensibility. Furthermore, through the medium of literature, she delicately depicted the lives and emotions of women of her time, thereby overcoming the limitations of her era and building her own world.
translatedText: Ta ƙasƙantar da wahalar ta ta hanyar ƙirƙirar 'Tale of Genji', ta zayyana kyakkyawar lura da hankali. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar hanyoyin adabi, ta zayyana rayuwa da motsin zuciyar matan zamaninta, ta yadda ta shawo kan gazawar zamaninta da gina duniyarta.

sourceText: Heian Period
translatedText: Lokacin Heian

sourceText: Edgar Degas
translatedText: Edgar Degas

sourceText: He faced financial pressures from his father and doubts about traditional academic art training. Later in life, he suffered from progressive vision loss.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci matsin kuɗi daga mahaifinsa da shakku game da horar da fasahar fasaha na gargajiya. Daga baya a rayuwa, ya sha wahala daga ci gaba da asarar hangen nesa.

sourceText: Degas pursued his unique artistic vision throughout his life, refusing to be confined by tradition and forging a new path with his distinctive perspective and techniques. Despite his failing eyesight, he explored various mediums, including sculpture, maintaining his passion for art.
translatedText: Degas ya bi hangen nesa na fasaha na musamman a duk rayuwarsa, yana ƙin tsare shi ta hanyar al'ada kuma ya ƙirƙira sabuwar hanya tare da ra'ayi na musamman da dabarunsa. Duk da gazawar ganinsa, ya binciko hanyoyin sadarwa daban-daban, ciki har da sassaka, yana kiyaye sha'awar fasaha.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Oscar Wilde
translatedText: Oscar Wilde

sourceText: Persecution due to societal prejudice and moral judgment, leading to unjust imprisonment and profound suffering.
translatedText: Tsanantawa saboda son zuciya na al'umma da hukunci na ɗabi'a, wanda ke haifar da ɗaurin zalunci da wahala mai tsanani.

sourceText: Despite immense hardship, he maintained his passion for art, using his writing to express his truths and experiences, thereby seeking spiritual freedom.
translatedText: Duk da tsananin wahala, ya ci gaba da sha’awar fasaha, yana amfani da rubutunsa don bayyana gaskiyarsa da abubuwan da ya faru, ta haka ne yake neman ‘yanci na ruhaniya.

sourceText: Late 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi karni na 19

sourceText: Rabindranath Tagore
translatedText: Rabindranath Tagore

sourceText: He faced societal constraints and personal tragedies, yet his spirit remained unbroken, finding solace and expression through his art.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci matsalolin al'umma da bala'o'i, duk da haka ruhunsa ya kasance ba karya ba, yana samun ta'aziyya da bayyanawa ta hanyar fasaharsa.

sourceText: Through his prolific writing and profound philosophical insights, Tagore transformed his experiences into universal messages of hope, resilience, and the interconnectedness of all beings.
translatedText: Ta hanyar rubutattun rubuce-rubucensa da zurfin fahimtar ilimin falsafa, Tagore ya canza abubuwan da ya samu zuwa saƙon bege na duniya, juriya, da haɗin kai na dukkan halittu.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Farkon ƙarni na 20

sourceText: The pain of having her intellectual pursuits restricted due to her gender within strict religious and societal norms. She endured the threat of the Inquisition and the envy and criticism of her fellow nuns.
translatedText: Zafin da aka takura mata na neman ilimi saboda jinsinta a cikin tsauraran ka'idojin addini da na al'umma. Ta jure barazanar Tambayoyi da hassada da sukar ’yan uwanta mata.
